title: Positive Flow: Navigate to Profile Page
test_steps: Open the app. | Navigate to the profile page for 'appcrawler4'.
expected_result: The profile page for 'appcrawler4' is displayed. | The title 'appcrawler4' is visible in the center of the screen.

title: Negative Flow: Invalid Username
test_steps: Open the app. | Attempt to navigate to the profile page for 'invalid_username'.
expected_result: An error message or notification is displayed indicating that the username does not exist.

title: UI Test: Profile Icon Click
test_steps: Open the app. | Click on the profile icon in the header/app bar.
expected_result: The profile page for 'appcrawler4' is displayed.

title: Usability Test: Navigation Bar
test_steps: Open the app. | Navigate to the profile page for 'appcrawler4'. | Click on the 'menu' icon in the navigation bar at the bottom.

title: Accessibility Test: Screen Reader
test_steps: Open the app. | Navigate to the profile page for 'appcrawler4'. | Use a screen reader to navigate through the profile page.
expected_result: All elements on the profile page are accessible and can be read by a screen reader.

title: Data Persistence Test: Logout
test_steps: Open the app. | Navigate to the profile page for 'appcrawler4'. | Log out of the app. | Reopen the app. | Attempt to navigate to the profile page for 'appcrawler4'.
expected_result: The profile page for 'appcrawler4' is not displayed.
